latestApkVersion.description: Latest ShopLink APK version string — updated by GitHub Actions on each build

latestApkUrl.description: Direct download URL for the latest APK

forceUpdate.description: Set to true to force all users to update immediately — dialog cannot be dismissed

maintenanceMode.description: Set to true to show maintenance screen to all users

defaultValue.value: ShopLink is under maintenance. We will be back shortly.
